source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, which is the main oscillation stage of a low-frequency signal generator, the name of this circuit is ( ), and ( ) is the thermistor, which accelerates the establishment of oscillation and stabilizes the amplitude.

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'In the circuit shown in the figure', so the figure is required to answer
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the sample is primarily visual rather than solvable from text alone
the task asks to identify both the circuit type and which labeled resistor is the thermistor, which depends on reading schematic labels/components from the image
multi_step: the question has two linked blanks: identify the oscillator class and identify which labeled part is the thermistor

there are 4 choices combining two attributes, so solving is more than a single visual lookup
verifiability: choices are provided, so the final answer is constrained to a small finite set of candidate outputs
answer_text is explicit: 'RC Wien bridge oscillator, R3', which is easy to compare against options
registry_passed=true, question_present=true, and answer_present=true support that the sample is intact enough for downstream checking
